common.copyright: © {year} Asteria Diamond House. All rights reserved.

footer.description: A refined diamond house — certified loose diamonds, custom engagement rings, and private consultations.
footer.trustNote: Diamond grading reports are provided by recognized laboratories such as GIA, IGI, HRD, or GCAL where available.

home.heroDescription: Choose a certified diamond, select your setting, and create a ring with quiet confidence.
home.brandIntroDescription: Asteria Diamond House offers a calm, considered path to your diamond — certified stones, expert guidance, and rings made around your story. We focus on diamonds alone, so every detail earns its place.
home.diamondsDescription: Browse certified loose diamonds with clear grading details. Each stone is presented with the report information you need — lab, report number, and a link to the official report when available.
home.categoriesEmptyDescription: Connect your database and run the seed script to populate diamond collections.
home.productsEmptyDescription: Run npm run seed after configuring MongoDB to populate signature diamond rings.
home.bespokeDescription: Our guided ring builder pairs certified diamonds with compatible settings. Choose your stone, select metal and size, and see pricing as you go — unhurried and clear.
home.bespokeFeature1: Begin with a setting or a diamond
home.bespokeFeature3: Calm, real-time pricing as you build
home.consultationTitle: A consultation, not a sales pitch
home.consultationDescription: Meet with a diamond specialist in person or online. We help you understand certification, compare stones, and design a ring that feels genuinely yours.
home.whyCertifiedDescription: Grading report details from recognized laboratories such as GIA and IGI — presented clearly, never overstated.
home.whyBuilderDescription: Design your engagement ring step by step with compatible settings, diamonds, and metals.
home.whyConsultDescription: Private virtual or in-store appointments with diamond specialists who listen first.
home.whySecureDescription: Save your diamond and ring choices securely while you decide — no pressure, no rush.
home.whyEthicalDescription: Every diamond is carefully selected for quality and responsible sourcing.
home.whyCraftDescription: Our master jewellers bring decades of experience to every piece.
home.whyCareDescription: Complimentary cleaning, resizing, and maintenance for life.
home.faq1Question: How long does a custom ring take?
home.faq1Answer: Custom rings typically take 2–4 weeks from final design approval to completion.
home.faq2Answer: Yes, we offer complimentary resizing within 90 days of purchase.
home.faq3Answer: All our diamonds include grading report details from GIA, IGI, and other recognized labs.
home.heroImageAlt: Loose diamond at Asteria Diamond House
home.bespokeImageAlt: Solitaire diamond ring at Asteria Diamond House
home.consultationImageAlt: Private diamond consultation at Asteria Diamond House

createRing.title: Create Your Ring
createRing.description: Pair a certified diamond with your chosen setting and metal.

looseDiamonds.title: Loose Diamonds
looseDiamonds.description: Browse certified stones with clear grading details.

engagementRings.title: Engagement Rings
engagementRings.description: Refined solitaire and diamond ring styles.

ringSettings.title: Ring Settings
ringSettings.description: Classic and contemporary settings for your diamond.

home.appointmentDescription: Book an appointment and we'll help you choose the right diamond, setting and metal.
home.testimonial1: They helped us find a GIA-certified diamond we actually understood — calm, clear, and never pushy.
home.testimonial2: The ring builder made it simple to pair our oval diamond with the right setting. The result feels truly ours.
home.testimonial3: A considered experience from first consultation to final ring. Exactly the quiet luxury we wanted.
home.shopByCategoryDescription: Thoughtfully designed collections for the engagement and every day after.

about.pageDescription: Learn about Asteria Diamond House and its founder, Diana Angelaki.
about.founderBio: Diana Angelaki (officially Diana Koubatiadou Angelaki) is the founder of Asteria Diamond House and also the founder of Diana Lux Travel.
about.houseDescription: Asteria Diamond House offers a calm, considered path to your diamond — certified stones, expert guidance, and rings made around your story. We focus on diamonds alone, so every detail earns its place.

products.pageDescription: A curated selection of diamond engagement rings and signature solitaires. Each piece is diamond-focused — refined, not mass-market.
products.resultsCount: {count, plural, =1 {# product found} other {# products found}}

diamonds.pageDescription: Explore certified loose diamonds. Filter by shape, carat, color, clarity, and more — presented with clear grading report details.
diamonds.resultsCount: {count, plural, =1 {# diamond found} other {# diamonds found}}

ringBuilder.pageDescription: Design your perfect ring by choosing a setting, diamond, metal, and ring size.
ringBuilder.startDescription: From solitaires to signature settings — choose your path, then pair a certified diamond, metal, and size.
ringBuilder.startWithSettingDescription: Browse styles like solitaire, halo, and three-stone, then choose a compatible diamond.
ringBuilder.startWithDiamondDescription: Select a certified stone by shape, carat, and grade, then find the perfect setting.
ringBuilder.howStep1: Begin with a setting or diamond
ringBuilder.howStep4: Review your ring and book a consultation
ringBuilder.settingDescription: Start with a ring style — solitaire, halo, three-stone — then refine by metal and compatible diamond shape.
ringBuilder.diamondDescription: Browse certified diamonds. Filter by origin, shape, carat, color, cut, and clarity.
ringBuilder.reviewDescription: Choose metal and ring size, confirm your selection, then add to bag or book a consultation.
ringBuilder.incompleteTitle: Your ring is not complete yet
ringBuilder.incompleteDescription: Choose both a ring setting and a diamond to review your custom ring.
ringBuilder.invalidDescription: The selected setting or diamond could not be found. Please start again.
ringBuilder.visualSubtitle: Choose your diamond, setting and metal. We'll guide you step by step.
ringBuilder.chooseDiamondDescription: Browse certified stones by shape, carat and grade.
ringBuilder.chooseSettingDescription: Select a solitaire or signature setting for your stone.
ringBuilder.chooseMetalDescription: White gold, yellow gold, rose gold or platinum.
ringBuilder.reviewRingDescription: Confirm your selections and book a consultation.
ringBuilder.journeySettingBody: Pick a style — solitaire, halo, three-stone, and more.
ringBuilder.journeyDiamondBody: Filter by shape, carat, color, clarity, and certification.
ringBuilder.journeyMetalBody: Select white, yellow or rose gold, platinum, and your ring size.
ringBuilder.journeyReviewBody: Review pricing, add to bag, or book a private consultation.
ringBuilder.settingStyleHint: Choose the look of your ring, then refine by metal and diamond shape.

sidebar.title: How We Can Help
sidebar.inStoreDescription: Visit our showroom to see settings and diamonds in person.
sidebar.virtualDescription: Meet with a specialist online from the comfort of your home.
sidebar.customRingDescription: Design your dream ring with expert advice on settings and diamonds.
sidebar.diamondDescription: Understand cut, color, clarity, and certification before you choose.

seo.homeTitle: Asteria Diamond House | Certified Diamonds & Custom Rings
seo.homeDescription: Discover certified loose diamonds and create your custom engagement ring. Private consultations, expert guidance, quiet luxury.
seo.productsDescription: Curated diamond engagement rings and signature solitaires from Asteria Diamond House.
seo.diamondsDescription: Explore our collection of ethically sourced, certified diamonds.
seo.createRingDescription: Design your perfect ring by choosing a setting, diamond, metal, and ring size.
seo.createRingSettingDescription: Browse ring settings and select one compatible with your diamond shape.
seo.createRingDiamondDescription: Select a certified diamond for your custom ring.
seo.createRingReviewDescription: Confirm your ring selections before adding to bag or booking an appointment.
seo.cartDescription: Review your diamond and custom ring selections.
seo.appointmentDescription: Book a diamond or custom ring consultation with our specialists.
seo.aboutDescription: Meet Diana Angelaki, founder of Asteria Diamond House — certified diamonds, custom rings, and quiet luxury.

comingSoon.metaDescription: Asteria Diamond House is preparing a new experience in certified diamonds and custom rings. Coming soon.
comingSoon.title: Coming Soon
comingSoon.description: We are crafting a refined experience in certified diamonds and bespoke rings. Something quietly unforgettable is on its way.

checkout.pageDescription: Enter your details and pay securely with Viva.com Smart Checkout.
checkout.name: Full name
checkout.vivaNote: You will be redirected to Viva.com to complete payment securely.
checkout.errorGeneric: Could not start payment. Please try again.
checkout.emptyBag: Your bag is empty. Add a diamond or ring before checkout.
checkout.successDescription: Thank you. Your payment was successful. We will be in touch shortly about your order.
checkout.failureDescription: The payment was cancelled or could not be completed. You can try again or return to your bag.
checkout.shippingMethodDescription: DHL Express rates are calculated for insured jewellery parcels.
checkout.shippingEnterAddress: Enter city, postal code, and country to see DHL rates.
checkout.shippingError: Could not calculate shipping. Please check the address and try again.
checkout.shippingFallbackNote: Showing estimated rates. Live DHL pricing will apply once API credentials are configured.
